scenes.title: Basemap only
scenes.body: Start with the Paris region as a fixed spatial frame. Do not move the camera.

scenes.title: Draw the legal core
scenes.body: Paris proper: the compact legal city around the historic core.

scenes.title: Reveal the built city
scenes.body: Built-up Paris: the dense contiguous urban fabric most people would recognize as the city.

scenes.title: Reveal the attraction area
scenes.body: Wider commuting region: the same city suddenly covers far more territory.

scenes.title: The border changes the city
scenes.body: Same city, radically different extents depending on the border. Nothing moved on the map. Only the border changed.
